title: agrostis californica
intro: Agrostis californica, also known as California bentgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Agrostis californica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Agrostis californica can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
